name: Nina
manager_notes: Nina shipped two major features ahead of schedule after several weeks of late nights and has been downplaying concern. I need to separate output from sustainability and understand what is actually driving the current load now that the sprint pressure is over. I also want to hear where she feels blocked in visibility and influence, because strong execution without recognition can quietly drain engagement. This check-in should clarify her near-term priorities and what support she actually wants from me.
answers: Push worked, but doesn't want that pace to become normal.
Less overloaded now, but calendar is still fragmented.
A lot of energy went into firefighting and context switching.
Can ship quickly, but doesn't always feel the impact is visible.
Feedback on communication landed — still processing it.
Wants more room to lead cross-functional discussions earlier.
Next two weeks should focus on stabilizing and reducing reactive work.
Clear priority tradeoffs from leadership would help a lot.
Wants to pick one priority tradeoff to resolve with leadership before the next two weeks get noisier.
